user.title: Connect to Claude.ai
user.description:
Enter your Claude.ai credentials.

**How to find your Session Key:**
1. Open [claude.ai](https://claude.ai) and log in
2. Open DevTools (F12) → Application → Cookies → `https://claude.ai`
3. Copy the value of the `sessionKey` cookie

**How to find your Organization ID:**
1. In DevTools, open the Network tab and reload the page
2. Find any request URL containing `/api/organizations/`
3. Copy the UUID from the URL (e.g. `xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx`)

reauth.title: Re-authenticate Claude Pulse
reauth.description: Your Claude.ai session key has expired. Follow the steps above to get a new one.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid session key or Organization ID — authentication failed (HTTP 401/403).
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach claude.ai — check your network connection and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Claude.ai Organization ID is already configured.
abort.reauth_successful: Re-authentication successful. Sensors will resume updating.

init.title: Update Claude Pulse settings
init.description:
Update your Session Key, Organization ID, or update interval.

**How to find your Session Key:**
1. Open [claude.ai](https://claude.ai) and log in
2. Open DevTools (F12) → Application → Cookies → `https://claude.ai`
3. Copy the value of the `sessionKey` cookie

**How to find your Organization ID:**
1. In DevTools, open the Network tab and reload the page
2. Find any request URL containing `/api/organizations/`
3. Copy the UUID from the URL (e.g. `xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx`)

error.invalid_auth: Invalid session key or Organization ID — authentication failed (HTTP 401/403).
